unit.name: WP_HTTP_Proxy constants, bypass, and filter behavior
unit.public_contract: This fixture executes copied WordPress 7.0 wp-includes/class-wp-http-proxy.php in isolated PHP CLI probes with deterministic site option and pre_http_send_through_proxy filter stubs. It observes proxy enablement constants, authentication accessors/header output, malformed URL pass-through, localhost/site URL bypass, exact and wildcard WP_PROXY_BYPASS_HOSTS matching, and filter override behavior without claiming live HTTP transport routing, Requests/cURL/fsockopen proxy integration, TLS/proxy negotiation, installed distribution behavior, or generated public PHP ownership.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass Requests/cURL/fsockopen proxy integration, recorded/live HTTP transport behavior, TLS/proxy negotiation, installed distribution routes, selected upstream PHPUnit, and ecosystem fixtures before claiming public PHP ownership.
